name: build-policy
description: Defines build validation requirements, quality gates, and compilation standards for the Website Factory output.

requiredChecks.description: All of these must pass before any deployment or phase transition

lint.description: ESLint with next/core-web-vitals and typescript rules

typescriptStrictMode.description: All TypeScript code must compile under strict mode

builderAgentVerification.description: Each builder agent must verify typecheck passes before finishing

mergeVerification.description: After merging worktree branches, full build must pass
